prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科（物理类）最低位次分别为约5457名→7640名→9881名→8095名→5798名，整体呈先降后升的V型走势；2024年因新高考改革科类调整出现位次后移 ，2025年大幅回升2297位，显示该校在吉林省理科考生中的吸引力明显增强；该校在吉林省理科组招生计划2021年71人、2022年79人、2023年110人、2024年89 人、2025年88人；2026年计划72人，较2025年减少16人（缩招约18%），缩招将加剧竞争，对位次有上推作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国 大学排名近年稳定在第29–32位（2026年第31位），属于国内顶尖高校行列，对高分考生有持续吸引力；抖音学校热度总排名第16位，评价为"高热"，综合热度 超310万，短视频平台曝光量大；声誉文件中未见明显负面舆情或投档断档记录，学校形象正面稳定；第五轮学科评估中A-及以上学科共8个：化学A、机械工程A 、工商管理A、土木工程A-、应用经济学A-、控制科学与工程A-、电气工程A-、计算机科学与技术A-，工科与管理学科实力均衡，与招生专业高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业在2024–2026年专业热度分析中均为"高热推荐"或"推荐"级别，与湖南大学优势学科方向一致，推高相关专业报考热度；吉 林省2026年高考总人数110868人，较2025年111492人微降约0.6%，竞争压力基本持平；湖南大学位于湖南省长沙市，属中南地区 ，与吉林省地理距离较远；该校在吉林省招生占比约1%-2%（2025年约88人/全国总计划），属外省招生中等规模，无明显地域偏好信号。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅回 升的强势走势、2026年理科组缩招18%带来的竞争加剧、学校高热度的报考关注度以及工科热门专业的持续吸引力；预测2026年理科最低位次 约5366名，区间4866–5866名，较2025年5798名略有前移，竞争进一步加剧。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 5457 → 7640 → 9881 → 8095 → 5798, showing a V-shaped trend of first decreasing then increasing; in 2024, due to the adjustment of subject categories in the new college entrance examination reform, the ranking shifted backward, and in 2025 it rebounded significantly by 2297 places, indicating a notable increase in the university's appeal among science candidates in Jilin Province; the enrollment plan for the science group in Jilin Province was 71 in 2021, 79 in 2022, 110 in 2023, 89 in 2024, and 88 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 72, a decrease of 16 from 2025 (a reduction of about 18%), which will intensify competition and push the ranking upward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university; the Soft Science China University Ranking has been stable at 29th–32nd in recent years (31st in 2026), belonging to the top tier of domestic universities, with sustained appeal to high-scoring candidates; the overall popularity ranking on Douyin is 16th, rated as 'high heat', with comprehensive popularity exceeding 3.1 million, and high exposure on short video platforms; the reputation file shows no obvious negative public opinion or records of enrollment gaps, with a positive and stable image; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 8 disciplines rated A- or above: Chemistry A, Mechanical Engineering A, Business Administration A, Civil Engineering A-, Applied Economics A-, Control Science and Engineering A-, Electrical Engineering A-, and Computer Science and Technology A-, with balanced strength in engineering and management disciplines, highly matching the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation were rated as 'highly recommended' or 'recommended' in the 2024–2026 major popularity analysis, consistent with the advantageous disciplines of Hunan University, boosting the application heat for related majors; the total number of candidates for the 2026 college entrance examination in Jilin Province is 110,868, a slight decrease of about 0.6% from 111,492 in 2025, with basically unchanged competitive pressure; Hunan University is located in Changsha City, Hunan Province, in the Central South region, with a relatively large geographical distance from Jilin Province; the university's enrollment proportion in Jilin Province is about 1%–2% (approximately 88 out of the national total in 2025), which is a medium scale for out-of-province enrollment, with no obvious regional preference signals.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong upward trend in rankings in 2025, the intensified competition due to an 18% reduction in the science group enrollment in 2026, the high application attention due to the university's popularity, and the sustained appeal of popular engineering majors; it is predicted that the minimum ranking for science in 2026 will be approximately 5366, with a range of 4866–5866, slightly moving forward compared to 5798 in 2025, with further intensified competition.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 5366, range 4866–5866. Candidates with rankings outside the upper limit (5866) are advised to mainly use Tier 3 as a safety option; those within the range (4866–5866) are advised to mainly use Tier 2 with Tier 1 as a reach; those significantly better than the lower limit (within 4866) can focus on reaching for Tier 1's top popular majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, and Artificial Intelligence.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (history category) were approximately 856 → 871 → 648 → 803 → 813, fluctuating narrowly within the 648–871 range, stabilizing near 800 in recent years, with a 2025 baseline of about 813; the university's liberal arts enrollment plan in Jilin Province was 13 in 2021, 12 in 2022, 11 in 2023, 14 in 2024, and 14 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 35, a significant increase of 21 students (150% expansion) compared to 2025, which will substantially lower the admission threshold and significantly reduce rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking has been stable at 29–32 in recent years (31st in 2026); the top-tier university level strongly attracts liberal arts candidates; its Douyin school popularity total ranking is 16th, rated as 'high heat'; no negative public opinion is found in reputation documents, with an overall positive image; related advantageous disciplines for liberal arts majors include Business Administration rated A (corresponding to Business Administration, Accounting, etc.) and Applied Economics rated A- (corresponding to Finance, Economics categories), with outstanding disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors show divergent popularity: Law (differentiated wait-and-see), Chinese Language and Literature (recommended), Journalism and Communication (clearly discouraged); the total number of Jilin Province Gaokao candidates in 2026 is 110,868, with an estimated 30,821 in the history category based on the recent proportion of about 27.8%, a slight decrease from 31,071 in 2025, easing competition slightly; Hunan University is located in Changsha City, Hunan Province, in the Central South region; its liberal arts enrollment in Jilin Province is very small (only 14 in 2025), but the 2026 expansion to 35 will significantly increase its share, indicating the university's intention to expand its liberal arts student base in Jilin, which is a positive signal for candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the stable 2025 ranking baseline of 813, the significant easing effect from the 150% expansion of the liberal arts group in 2026, the sustained attraction of the university's 985 level to candidates, and the divergent popularity of liberal arts majors; it is predicted that the minimum ranking for liberal arts in 2026 will be approximately 1465, with a range of 1245–1685, a notable drop from the 2025 ranking of 813, indicating significantly reduced admission difficulty.

Candidates with rankings above the upper limit (1685) are advised to use Tier 3 as a safety; those within the range (1245–1685) are advised to focus on Tier 2 with Tier 1 as a reach; those significantly better than the lower limit (within 1245) can focus on popular majors like Law, Finance, and Accounting.
